data.text: Defender guild-u3: shuttle rn-lowland [5,5] → deliver [6,6]. Turn 1: move [0,1]→[2,1]. Subsequent: continue SE toward [5,5], gather (carry 1), deliver at [6,6], repeat.

guild-1 (scout): BEACON HOLD MISSION. Move east along row 0 toward [12,0]. Turn 1: move to [3,0]. Continue max 3 steps/turn toward [12,0]. Upon arrival, hold [12,0] for 6 consecutive turns to complete ms-beacon (amount 4 + 2 capture).

guild-2 (harvester): CARAVAN DELIVER. Head to rn-lowland [5,5]. Turn 1: move to [3,1]. Gather (carry 3), deliver at [6,6]. Repeat shuttle: [5,5]→gather→[6,6]→deliver. Target: contribute ~9 of 10 resources.

guild-3 (defender): CARAVAN SUPPORT. Head to rn-lowland [5,5]. Turn 1: move to [2,2]. Gather (carry 1), deliver at [6,6]. Repeat shuttle. Target: contribute ~3 of 10 resources. Combined with harvester, complete ms-caravan.
Acknowledged. Moving to [3,0] per beacon hold plan. Will continue east along row 0 toward [12,0] each turn. Will report when I reach the beacon.

Acknowledged caravan plan. Note: [3,1] is dist 3 from my pos [1,0] (move=2). Moving to [3,0] instead — max east progress. Next turn I'll push to [3,1] or [4,1] toward rn-lowland [5,5]. Will gather and shuttle to [6,6] as directed.

Acknowledged caravan support plan. Moving to [2,1] this turn — [2,2] is out of range (Manhattan 3 from [0,1], my move is 2). Will continue toward rn-lowland [5,5] next turn. Expect to reach gather point by turn 3-4.
greedy split: harvester runs node-to-target relay; scout takes the far point, defender the near one

Scout (guild-1): Head east to cp-beacon [12,0]. Turn 1: [6,0]. Turn 2: [9,0]. Turn 3: [12,0]. Turns 4-5: hold to capture. Turns 6-9: hold to complete ms-beacon. Harvester/Defender handle rn-lowland [5,5] and deliver to ms-caravan [6,6].

PLAN: Split operations. guild-1 (scout) secures cp-beacon [12,0] for hold mission ms-beacon (needs 6 consecutive turns: 2 to capture + 4 to complete). guild-2 (harvester, carry 3) and guild-3 (defender, carry 1) gather from rn-lowland [5,5] and rn-highland [8,6], deliver to ms-caravan [6,6]. Turn 1 orders: guild-1 move to [6,0] (heading east toward beacon). guild-2 move to [5,0] (heading toward rn-lowland). guild-3 move to [4,1] (heading toward rn-lowland).
Acknowledged. Moving to [6,0] toward cp-beacon [12,0]. ETA: 2 more turns to reach beacon. Will hold for capture on arrival.
Acknowledged. Moving to [5,0] toward rn-lowland [5,5]. Will gather and deliver to ms-caravan [6,6].
Acknowledged. guild-u3 moving to [4,1] heading toward rn-lowland [5,5]. Will gather and deliver to ms-caravan [6,6] as planned.
Defender supports ms-caravan: [4,1]→[5,2]→[5,4]→[5,5] gather→[6,6] deliver. Repeat if needed for 10 resources.

STANDING PLAN — Split operations: Scout takes hold mission (ms-beacon at cp-beacon [12,0]); Harvester + Defender take deliver mission (ms-caravan, 10 resources at [6,6]). Gather from rn-lowland [5,5] first, then rn-highland [8,6] if needed. Turn limit 16 — stay efficient.

SCOUT: You are assigned ms-beacon (hold). Move east along row 0 to cp-beacon [12,0]. This turn: move 3 right to [9,0]. Next turn: move 3 right to [12,0]. Then hold for 2 turns to capture, then 4 more turns to complete (total 6 turns on the point). Do not leave once you begin holding.

HARVESTER: You are primary gatherer for ms-caravan. Move south to rn-lowland [5,5]. This turn: move 2 down to [5,2]. Next: continue to [5,4], then [5,5] to gather (carry 3). Deliver at [6,6]. Repeat: gather → deliver cycle. Target: 10 team resources.

DEFENDER: Support ms-caravan deliver mission. Move toward rn-lowland [5,5]. This turn: move to [5,3] (1 right, 2 down). Continue to [5,5] to gather (carry 1), deliver at [6,6]. Coordinate with harvester — if rn-lowland depletes, use rn-highland [8,6].
Acknowledged. Moving to [9,0] this turn, then [12,0] next turn to begin hold on cp-beacon. Will hold for capture (2 turns) then complete ms-beacon (4 more turns).
Acknowledged. Moving to [5,2] this turn, continuing south to rn-lowland [5,5] next. Will gather and deliver at [6,6] for ms-caravan.
Defender moving to [5,2] (1R,1D). Note: [5,3] is dist 3 from [4,1] — exceeds my move=2. I'll reach [5,4] next turn, then [5,5] to gather. Will coordinate with harvester on rn-lowland.

guild-u1 (scout): TURN 4 — Move to [12,0] (distance 3, your move is 3). Then HOLD there every turn through turn 10. Six consecutive turns on cp-beacon captures it (turns 5-6) and completes the hold mission of amount 4 (by turn 10). Do not leave.

guild-u2 (harvester): TURN 4 — Move toward [5,5] (go to [5,4]). TURN 5 — Arrive [5,5], gather (fill to carry 3). TURN 6 — Move to [6,6], deliver. Then repeat: gather at [5,5], deliver at [6,6]. After 2 trips switch to rn-highland [8,6] for shorter return trips. Target: 9 of 10 resources.

guild-u3 (defender): TURN 4 — Move toward [5,5] (go to [5,4]). TURN 5 — Arrive [5,5], gather (carry 1). TURN 6 — Move to [6,6], deliver. Repeat gather-deliver cycle. You provide the final resources to complete ms-caravan. Target: 1-2 resources.
Acknowledged. Moving to [12,0] this turn (distance 3). Will hold cp-beacon every turn to capture and complete ms-beacon. Standing by.
Acknowledged. Moving to [5,4] this turn to reach rn-lowland [5,5] next turn. Will gather and deliver as planned.
Acknowledged. Moving to [5,4] to begin gather-deliver cycle at rn-lowland [5,5]. Will coordinate with u2 on resource runs to complete ms-caravan.
u2: gather at rn-lowland [5,5], deliver at [6,6]. Repeat. u1 holds cp-beacon [12,0]. u3 mirrors u2 gather/deliver cycle.
guild-u1 (scout): HOLD at [12, 0]. You are on cp-beacon with 1 turn of hold streak. Need 5 more turns of sole occupancy to complete ms-beacon (amount 4 = 6 total turns). Do not move.
guild-u2 (harvester): Move to [5, 5] and GATHER from rn-lowland (carry 3). Then move to [6, 6] and DELIVER. Repeat cycle: gather at [5, 5], deliver at [6, 6]. Target: 10 resources for ms-caravan.
guild-u3 (defender): Move to [5, 5] and GATHER from rn-lowland (carry 1). Then move to [6, 6] and DELIVER. Repeat cycle: gather at [5, 5], deliver at [6, 6]. Support ms-caravan alongside harvester.

Holding at [12, 0] on cp-beacon. Continuing streak for ms-beacon (hold mission, amount 4). Will maintain sole occupancy until captured + hold complete. u2 and u3 handle rn-lowland gather/deliver cycle.
Acknowledged. Moving to [5, 5] to gather from rn-lowland. Will cycle gather->deliver at [6, 6] as instructed. u3, coordinate gathering so we don't block each other.
Acknowledged. Moving to [5, 5] to gather from rn-lowland. Will cycle gather/deliver at [6, 6] to support ms-caravan alongside guild-u2.
u2: gather at [5,5] → move to [6,6] → deliver → repeat. u1 holds cp-beacon. u3 mirrors u2 shuttle.
guild-u1 (scout): HOLD at [12, 0] — continue sole occupancy of cp-beacon. We have 2 turns of hold; need 4 more (total 6) to complete ms-beacon (amount 4). Do not leave.

guild-u2 (harvester): GATHER at rn-lowland [5, 5] this turn. Next turn MOVE to deliver point [6, 6] (dist 2). Following turn DELIVER. Then repeat: back to [5, 5], gather, move, deliver. You carry 3 per load.
guild-u3 (defender): GATHER at rn-lowland [5, 5] this turn. Next turn MOVE to [6, 6]. Following turn DELIVER. Repeat cycle. You carry 1 per load. Stay on the gather→deliver shuttle.
Acknowledged. HOLD at [12, 0] — maintaining cp-beacon streak. 2 turns done, 4 more to complete ms-beacon (amount 4). Will not leave until mission complete or master redirects.
Acknowledged. GATHERING at rn-lowland [5, 5]. Will shuttle to deliver point [6, 6] next turn, then DELIVER. Cycle: gather→move→deliver. Carry capacity 3.
Acknowledged. Gathering at rn-lowland [5, 5] (carry 1). Next turn I'll move to [6, 6] to deliver, then repeat the shuttle cycle. I'll keep the resource pipeline flowing to support ms-beacon hold.

PLAN: Split relay (deliver) from hold (beacon). u1 HOLD at [12,0] to complete ms-beacon (hold streak 3→4). u2 MOVE to [6,6] then DELIVER 3 next turn. u3 MOVE to [6,6] then DELIVER 1 next turn. After delivering, u2/u3 shuttle: return to rn-lowland [5,5] or rn-highland [8,6], gather, move to [6,6], deliver. Repeat until ms-caravan reaches 10. u1 after hold completes: march toward [5,5] to join gathering. Priority: complete both missions within turn limit.
HOLD at [12,0]. This completes ms-beacon (4th consecutive turn). Then move toward [5,5] to help gather.
MOVE to [6,6] (deliver point). You carry 3 — deliver them next turn. Then shuttle: gather at [5,5] or [8,6], move to [6,6], deliver. Repeat.
MOVE to [6,6] (deliver point). You carry 1 — deliver next turn. Then shuttle: gather, move to [6,6], deliver. Repeat.
HOLDING at [12,0]. This completes ms-beacon (4th consecutive turn). After this turn I'll march toward [5,5] to join gathering. u2/u3 please keep shuttling resources to deliver point.
Moving to [6,6] to deliver 3 next turn. Will shuttle rn-lowland/rn-highland → [6,6] → deliver after.
Moving to [6,6] as planned. Will deliver 1 resource next turn, then shuttle: gather at [5,5] or [8,6], return to [6,6], deliver. Ready to coordinate with u2 on resource runs.

Turn 7 plan: u2 (harvester) DELIVER at [6,6] — unload your 3. u3 (defender) DELIVER at [6,6] — unload your 1. u1 (scout) HOLD at [12,0] — maintain cp-beacon streak for ms-beacon. After delivering, next turn both u2 and u3 move to resource nodes (rn-lowland [5,5] or rn-highland [8,6]) and GATHER, then return to [6,6] to DELIVER. Repeat gather-deliver cycle until team resources reach 10 for ms-caravan. u1 stays on beacon the entire time.

Standing plan: Split roles — u1 guards cp-beacon [12,0] for hold mission (already at 4/4 holds). u2+u3 run gather-deliver relay: gather at rn-lowland [5,5] or rn-highland [8,6], deliver at [6,6]. Each cycle adds 4 resources (3+1). Need 10 total; after this turn's delivery we'll have 4, so 2 more cycles needed.
Holding cp-beacon [12,0] as planned. Maintaining streak for ms-beacon hold mission. u2+u3 proceed with deliver cycle at [6,6].
Confirming DELIVER at [6,6] — unloading 3 resources. Next turn I'll move to rn-lowland [5,5] or rn-highland [8,6] to GATHER and repeat the cycle. u1 keep holding beacon.

Delivering 1 at [6,6] as planned. Next turn I'll move to rn-lowland [5,5] to gather (distance 2, within my move 2). u2 can take rn-highland [8,6] (distance 2). Then both return to [6,6] to deliver. Cycle: gather->deliver adds 4 resources/cycle. Need 2 more cycles after this delivery to reach 10.

guild-u2 (harvester): MOVE to rn-lowland [5,5]. Distance 2 from [6,6], within your move=2. Next turn: GATHER (carry=3), then return to [6,6] to DELIVER.
guild-u3 (defender): MOVE to rn-highland [8,6]. Distance 2 from [6,6], within your move=2. Next turn: GATHER (carry=1), then return to [6,6] to DELIVER.
HOLD at cp-beacon [12,0]. Hold streak will reach 6 (2 capture + 4 hold mission), completing ms-beacon. Confirming master plan.
Moving to rn-lowland [5,5] as planned. Will gather next turn (carry=3), then deliver back to base.
Moving to rn-highland [8,6] as planned. Will gather (carry=1) next turn and return to deliver. u1 holds beacon, u2 takes lowland — we split the relay from the hold.
u1: hold cp-beacon [12,0] for ms-beacon hold mission. u2/u3: continue gather-deliver cycles for any deliver mission. Prioritize completing open missions before turn 16.

PLAN: Complete ms-caravan (need 6 more resources, have 4/10). u2 (harvester): shuttle rn-lowland [5,5] ↔ deliver [6,6]. Gather (carry 3), deliver, repeat. u3 (defender): shuttle rn-highland [8,6] ↔ deliver [6,6]. Gather (carry 1), deliver, repeat. u1 (scout): march toward rn-highland [8,6] — move [10,1] this turn, then [8,2], [8,5], [8,6] to gather and deliver. Beacon hold is done. Focus: gather-deliver cycles. u2 completes mission by turn 13 with 2 cycles.

Holding cp-beacon [12,0] for ms-beacon (hold mission, amount 4). I'm already on the point — will hold to maintain streak. Master's caravan plan seems off; ms-beacon is still open in game state. u2/u3 keep shuttling resources if there's a deliver mission I can't see.
Acknowledged. u2 gathering at rn-lowland [5,5] now. Will shuttle to deliver [6,6] next turn. Cycle: gather→move→deliver→move back. Expect 6 resources in ~6 turns.
Acknowledged. u3 gathering at rn-highland [8,6] (carry 1). Next turn will move to deliver [6,6] (dist 2). Will cycle gather-deliver to complete ms-caravan with u2.
u1: scout to rn-highland [8,6] to gather (carry 2). u2/u3: deliver current cargo then cycle back to gather. Coordinate to hit resource targets within turn limit.

u2: move to [6,6] and deliver your 3. u3: move to [6,6] and deliver your 1. u1: move toward [8,6] (rn-highland) — head to [9,3] this turn. After delivery, u2 cycle back to rn-lowland [5,5] to gather, u3 cycle to rn-highland [8,6] to gather. We need 6 more resources for ms-caravan; u2+u3 deliver now gets us to 8, one more gather-deliver cycle finishes it.
Moving to [10,1] toward rn-highland [8,6]. Best reachable step (dist 3). Will reach [8,6] in ~2 more turns. Acknowledged plan: gather at highland, deliver to complete resource goals.
Acknowledged. Moving to [6,6] to deliver my 3 resources. Will cycle back to rn-lowland [5,5] to gather after delivery.
Acknowledged. Moving to [6,6] to deliver my 1. After delivery I'll cycle to rn-highland [8,6] to gather as planned.

Split strategy: u1 holds cp-beacon [12,0] for the hold mission (need 6 total turns, turns 11-16). u2/u3 gather from rn-highland [8,6] and rn-lowland [5,5], then deliver at [6,6] to reach 10 team resources for the deliver mission.

Turn 11 — Deliver mission is priority. We have 4 team resources, need 10. u2 and u3 are at the deliver point [6,6] with cargo: deliver immediately. u1 move toward rn-highland [8,6]: go to [8,3] (max move toward it). Next turn all three gather, then deliver to hit 10.
u2 (harvester): DELIVER at [6,6]. You carry 3 — unload now.
u3 (defender): DELIVER at [6,6]. You carry 1 — unload now.
u1 (scout): MOVE to [8,3]. Head toward rn-highland [8,6] to gather next turn. You need to bring resources to the deliver point.

I'm moving to [12,0] to hold the beacon. The hold mission (amount 4) needs someone on cp-beacon continuously — I'll secure it while u2/u3 handle resources. Master: [8,3] was 4 tiles away (beyond my move-3), so I'm taking the beacon instead. We split: I hold, you gather/deliver.

Delivering 3 at [6,6]. After this we'll have 8/10. Next turn I'll move to rn-lowland [5,5] to gather 2 more (carry 3, need only 2). u1 gather at rn-highland [8,6]. u3 can gather rn-lowland or rn-highland too. We should hit 10 by turn 13.

DELIVER at [6,6]. Unloading 1 resource. Team should now have 5/10. After this turn I'll move toward cp-beacon [12,0] to support the hold mission — need to get there by turn 13 to start holding. u1 should gather at rn-highland [8,6] next turn and bring resources back.

Hold cp-beacon [12,0] to complete ms-beacon (2-turn streak). u2 gather rn-lowland [5,5], u3 gather rn-highland [8,6] — bring resources to finish ms-caravan.

Turn 12 — we need 2 more resources to complete ms-caravan (have 8/10). u2(harvester): move to [5,5] (lowland, dist=2). u3(defender): move to [8,6] (highland, dist=2). u1(scout): move toward center to [9,3] — you're too far to contribute this cycle but reposition for next.

Holding cp-beacon at [12,0]. We own it (turn 12) — ms-beacon requires 2 consecutive turns of sole occupancy. I'll maintain the streak. Note: [9,3] is dist 6 from here, beyond my move=3. If ms-caravan (deliver) needs resources, u2/u3 gathering at lowland/highland should cover the 2 we need.
Moving to [5,5] to gather at lowland. Will collect resources and head to deliver point. u1 keep holding beacon for ms-beacon hold mission.
u3 moving to [8,6] (highland) to gather. Will collect resources next turn. u2 should hit lowland at [5,5] — between us we should grab the 2 resources needed for ms-caravan.
u1 moves toward [6,6] for support. u2/u3 gather and deliver to complete deliver mission. Beacon hold not feasible in remaining turns.
guild-u2 (harvester): GATHER at rn-lowland [5,5] this turn. Next turn move to deliver [6,6]. Following turn DELIVER. This brings us to 11/10 — completes ms-caravan.
guild-u3 (defender): GATHER at rn-highland [8,6] this turn. Next turn move to deliver [6,6]. Following turn DELIVER. Backup completion.

Moving to [9,0] toward deliver square [6,6]. Will position for support. u2/u3 keep gather-deliver plan on track for ms-caravan.

Gathering at rn-highland [8,6] as planned. Next turn I'll move to [6,6] to deliver. Note: house-u2 is also at [8,6] - may contest.

PLAN: Complete ms-caravan (deliver 10) in 2 turns. guild-u2: move to [6,6] (deliver square) this turn. guild-u3: move to [6,6] this turn. guild-u1: move toward [8,3] to position for rn-highland gather next turn. Next turn: u2 and u3 deliver at [6,6] — that adds 4 resources (3+1) to our 8, completing the 10 needed. Mission done by turn 15.
